channel.title: Health Pointe Jacksonville
channel.description: Ultimate Health and Wellbeing Begins Here

item.title: Teresa E
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Miller has had a profound impact on my health and well-being that I was not able to get with any type of western medicine. After being denied for two surgeries I turned to Dr. Miller. My trigeminal neuralgia has been significantly reduced along with the amount of prescription drugs I was taking to dull the pain, especially through the winter months. I am also able to sleep better. I can’t say enough about her practice and the staff!

item.title: Stephani T
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I am so glad that I found this office. I arrived knowing I'll be taken care of and leave refreshed. The entire staff is warm, kind, and respectful. The treatments have improved my wellness and significantly reduced pain from a shoulder injury and almost eliminated the horrible migraines I had been experiencing.

item.title: Liss A
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I call Dr. Miller my miracle baby maker. My husband and I have tried to conceive for four years now… We were ready to try IVF, but after a few months of acupuncture with Dr. Miller, we were able to conceive naturally. She and her team have been absolutely wonderful

item.title: Kelly L
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I’ve been treating with Dr. Julie for about 3 months now. I’ve had 3 back surgeries over the last 9 years and, although the first surgery solved the radiating pain I was experiencing, about a year afterward, I started experiencing CONSTANT restless leg syndrome. Thereafter, I had 2 more back surgeries and over 30 other procedures to try to resolve the RLS – to no avail. I was referred to Dr. Julie and, although I had already lost any and all hope of ever being free of the RLS, I decided to give her a try given the amazing help she had given several others. When I started with her, I was using 100 mg Fentanyl patches for the RLS & 10/325 oxycodone every 4 hours for the breakthrough pain, which helped me to be able to continue to work versus filing for disability. However, I think the biggest ailment I was suffering was a very deep depression, to the point of having VERY dark thoughts. I started with Dr. Julie and, by my 3rd visit, was already feeling a tremendous diminishing in my leg pain/RLS and, by the end of the 2nd month, the pain had resolved enough for my pain management doctor & I to make the decision to start weaning down the strengths of my Fentanyl patches. I am now on 75 mg, with hopes of continuing to wean down further over the next couple of months. Dr. Julie’s treatment, combined with the lower strength patch, has also significantly lifted the fog of depression and I’m starting to experience joy & happiness, without much effort, and feeling like the old me. I cannot recommend Dr. Julie enough for anyone that is suffering from ANY type of ailment. Each visit I go in, I tell her where I’m having pain or how I’m feeling, even telling her of new problems, and she does her magic and I always come out of there with those pains & problems gone or greatly improved. I would never have believed Dr. Julie & acupuncture make such a difference in my daily quality of living, however, I’m now a true believer and will be singing her praises FOREVER! Please give her a try… you will not regret it!

item.title: Steve L
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr Julee is a true professional! She is very knowledgeable as when I explained my issue, she was very confident that she could help me. After a month and a half of treatments, my tennis and golfers elbow is 90 percent better. I saw a elbow specialist prior to Dr. Julee who put a plastic cast on my arm that would need to be worn for approximately one year. After 4 1/2 months I decided to try acupuncture. I am really glad I did. The staff and masseuses are excellent and the exam rooms are kept very clean. I highly recommend Dr Julee.

item.title: Angie P
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee is amazing! My husband and I went through fertility treatments and needed a good acupuncturist to supplement our treatments. Her methods were thorough and tailored to our exact situation. Not only was she knowledgeable about both traditional and alternative fertility treatments, her bedside manner was consistently positive and professional. Once I became pregnant, Dr. Julee continued to help me maintain a healthy pregnancy. Her caring approach helped me stay positive through our process and we are so thrilled that our baby boy has joined our family!

item.title: Robin S
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I went to Julee for one thing and she is treating me for several things. She helped my positional vertigo go away. I haven't taken my allergy medicine in 2 months. I used to take it every day for over 30 years. Wow! the list just goes on... my neck & shoulder were killing me all the time. Now I can't even remember when it hurt last. And, I have started losing weight again. I had been stuck for what seemed like forever. I would highly recommend Health Pointe. They are very professional and make you feel comfortable right from the beginning.

item.title: Denise I
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Miller and the staff at Health Pointe Jacksonville are wonderful. The office is very professional and inviting with a lovely staff that is always friendly and accommodating. The scheduling is quite organized and I never have to wait. Dr. Julee has been a life saver in helping me deal with the dizziness of detoxing from a nasty medication given to me for fibromyalgia. We are also working on balancing my crazy menopause hormones and pretty much anything else that pops up such as seasonal allergies etc. I am sleeping much better and my hot flashes are virtually gone. I’m very pleased with my progress!

item.title: Amy P
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have been going to Dr. Julee since February for lower back pain and fertility in preparation for IVF. I can’t say more wonderful things about health pointe acupuncture. All of the staff makes you feel so welcome and I always leave feeling very relaxed. Dr. Julee talks to you to target certain concerns and goals and acupuncture has benefited me in more ways than one! My sleep, anxiety, stress levels and back pain have improved since incorporating acupuncture and I can’t wait to see how my fertility journey plays out! Thank you for everything so far Health Pointe acupuncture!

item.title: Rob U
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have had multiple sclerosis for well over 20 years. I have pins and needles pain in my legs and feet 24/7 and very limited movement of my legs. I started Acupuncture treatment with Julee 3 weeks ago. Already the pain in my legs and feet has been reduced by 50% or more. My mobility is steadily improving as well. I walked up the stairs in my house tonight for the first time in over 3 years. I thought it would help some but this has far exceeded my expectations.

item.title: Stephanie O
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Acupuncture SAVED my 7 yr old! After going through a battery of medical tests to find out why my son's stomach constantly hurt, we realized he had anxiety. He had deep fears of being bit by something poisonous, which would ultimately lead to him dying. His worries also included traveling, flying, and school shootings. His fears escalated so badly and quickly that he would have panic attacks, and most mornings it was hard getting him out the door to school. As a mom, putting him on medication was LAST RESORT! We unsuccessfully tried talk therapy. We were then introduced to Dr. Julee from a friend that also had a son going through similar anxieties. Dr. Julee introduced and explained acupuncture in a way my 1st grader could understand. She started with light therapy and slowly introduced the needles as he felt comfortable. Results were seen quickly. Panic attacks stopped and my son soon was more calm and less worried. He also sleeps better at night. Two years later, my son still looks forward to going once a month to acupuncture. The room is relaxing and in his words, "the room makes me feel calm with the heater". He even gets to listen to his favorite music. He also loves the ear buds Dr. Julee applies, which she taught him how to manipulate when he feels a little worried, as well as ear massage techniques that also calm him. I am a true believer that acupuncture is the sole reason my son has been able to manage his anxiety. We love it and I promote it to anyone that is going through similar issues with their child.

item.title: Heather D
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Acupuncture has been KEY in the treatment of my son’s anxiety. I’m not a fan of giving my children medication and will always search for alternative treatments. My son’s anxiety surfaced in 2015 right after Hurricane Matthew came through St Johns. At first, we tried therapy, but it didn’t seem to be helping. That’s when I found Dr. Julee Miller and Health Pointe Jacksonville. At his first treatment he was nervous and only did a couple acupuncture needles paired with the infrared light therapy. With each treatment he added more needles and he would be so relaxed that he’d fall asleep. After his 3rd treatment, while walking to the car, he said: “mommy, I feel great!”. That made me so happy to hear because as a fellow anxiety sufferer I knew this was huge for him. He could barely get through a day at school without a breakdown. That makes it tough on a 4th grader since the other kids don’t understand what he’s going through. His concentration is better, his anxiety has gone away, and he has learned that if ever he feels a little “off” he can go see Dr. Julee and she will work her magic to make him feel great again. I am forever grateful to the wonderful work Dr. Julee and her team do at Health Pointe Jacksonville. I recommend them to everyone I know and especially to other parents of children that suffer with anxiety, depression, ADHD, etc. Acupuncture is absolutely a wonderful treatment option and, in my opinion, the best way to go!

item.title: Eileen A
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: My husband has a pinched nerve, most likely from an old sports injury, that was manifested in numbness in his left foot. After a neurological workup, it was determined that the pinched nerve was not serious enough for surgery or physical therapy. With the concurrence of his neurologist, he began seeing Dr. Julee Miller. The results were not immediate; but after repeated treatments the numbness significantly subsided. He is able to resume all his normal activities. I began seeing Dr. Miller for plantar fasciitis. The results from Dr. Miller's treatments were remarkable. We are extremely impressed with Dr. Miller and her approach to healing. Her staff is professional and clearly concerned with the wellness of the patients. We would highly recommend Health Pointe Jacksonville.

item.title: Leigh Ann J.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: For years I had unexplained abdominal pain, which was later diagnosed as uterine fibroids along with ovarian cysts. The western doctors suggested removing the ovary to see if that “stopped the pain” and a 2nd opinion recommended a complete hysterectomy at age 35! This is without any attempts to treat the conditions. I went to Julee Miller w/ Health Pointe Jax and had a few acupuncture sessions as well as took the recommended herbs. A few months later I went for a check-up and ALL the uterine fibroids were completely gone! (I would have continued treatment on the ovaries, but I moved out of state.) Julee has also treated me for migraines and stress – with absolutely miraculous results! She always understands whatever symptoms or conditions I have described to her and her treatments have always been highly effective! She also has a wonderful ‘bed-side manner’ and is a lovely practitioner.

item.title: Cynthia E.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee is the consummate health practitioner. For the past 2+ years, she has been invaluable in helping me keep my psoriasis in check and in addressing its root causes with acupuncture and infrared sauna treatments as well as herbal and injection therapies. She’s very methodical and observant, ensuring that she comprehensively addresses any maladies you may be experiencing at the time of each treatment, which for me has also included various aches and pains, infections and congestion. Her knowledge extends well beyond her specializations to complementary practices, for which she has also provided me with helpful recommendations and referrals. Her clinic is a pristine and spa-like refuge from day-to-day stresses where you can indulge in self-care. She is my go-to healthcare provider and I highly recommend her!

item.title: Tracey F.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Being unfamiliar with acupuncture, I had my doubts on how I could receive relief from pregnancy pain. Especially since almost everything is restricted during pregnancy. I suffered from pelvic floor pain. From the VERY first treatment with Dr Julee Miller I got immediate relief. I couldn’t use the pregnancy support belt without irritating my sciatica, she used her vast knowledge of understanding body aches & pains And was able to figure out a quick and easy alternative for me. I also received treatment for heartburn, which for any pregnant woman is a huge relief. However assisting me with my breech baby was the best. After being nervous of complications that come with breech babies, it was very soothing to be a patient with Dr Miller. She had no doubt she could help because she knew her methods would work, just as all my issues I consulted her for were treated and cured. I have recommended her services to any one I know and highly recommend any pregnant woman to seek her out, you will not be disappointed. Nothing like going to a calm, peaceful environment for treatment .

item.title: Jennifer G.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I first began seeing Dr. Julee Miller after hurting by back and hearing how great she was from a friend, who has been to her several times. I do not to like to take pain medications and was looking for an alternative approach. Acupuncture quickly treated the severe pain and spasms. I felt I turned the corner quicker with this form of treatment and escaped the side effects of narcotics and muscle relaxers. Dr. Miller encompasses the whole body and mind. She is extremely knowledgeable, professional and easy to talk to. I am now a true believer in acupuncture and highly recommend it to anyone that is experiencing pain and other physical issues. Above all, I recommend Dr Miller without any hesitation.

item.title: Jeremy L.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee took me in as a patient after arriving home from a six month deployment. I searched the city for the best in this field and I was beyond sold with the background that Dr. Julee has under her belt. Upon arriving back home I began my training for the Triple Jump, after two weeks back on the track my body was in terrible condition and the pain I was experiencing was unbearable. I went through similar treatments in college, and Dr. Julee immediately had a plan for me after describing the pain. One month worth of treatments had me in the best rehab shape I have ever experienced in my life. Currently being enlisted in the military, I owe a major part of my stellar performances competing with the best collegiate athletes to Dr. Julee. I can’t repay the health that Dr. Julee has restored to my athletic career, she for sure is the best around.

item.title: Gerd K.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I’ve been having problems with my feet and legs to the point, I cannot walk without shoes due to the pain. This is a result of chemotherapy over 6 years ago. A friend recommended that I try acupuncture. I went to Julee 6 months ago and the positive results, the first session, were phenomenal. Even though my condition will never return to normal, I can now walk from the bed to the bathroom without having to put on shoes. I have now reached a plateau therefore, we have cut back on the sessions for the purpose of maintaining what I have gained. I recommend Julee for any of your health care needs especially, if you have been told there is nothing that can be done to help you.

item.title: Amy, LMT
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded:
Amy is Health Pointe Jacksonville's newest medical massage therapist team member. She graduated from the Center of Natural Wellness School for Massage Therapy in 2020. She holds a BS in Kinesiology and has 5+ years of experience as a personal trainer at the Bethlehem YMCA. 

Amy has a passion for health and wellness and aspires to help clients live a pain free life.  She views the body in a holistic way. To ensure clients success, Amy develops  individualized treatment plans with the patient's goals in mind.  

With her background in kinesiology,  she has an in depth knowledge of the biomechanics of the body. Being a former athlete herself, Amy understands the importance of injury prevention and respects the recovery process. 

Amy provides therapeutic massage to rejuvenate the body’s fascia, muscles, tendons and ligaments. She has experience working with a wide variety of conditions including both chronic and acute injuries, postural imbalances and functional movement patterns. 

Amy's commitment is to help you get the relief your body deserves.

item.title: Kim T.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: There aren’t enough words to compliment Dr. Julee Miller and her acupuncture practice. Frustrated and exhausted by numerous failed fertility treatments/procedures I reached out to Dr. Miller and have been so thankful for her knowledge, expertise and treatments. The office and treatment rooms are comfortable and relaxing, Dr. Miller and her staff are always warm and welcoming, and every treatment is tailored to exactly to what I needed; anxiety, fertility treatments/support, allergies, GI issues, and now pregnancy nausea, to name a few. I do not hesitate to recommend Dr. Miller to anyone – I feel confident that whatever the issue you’re looking to relieve that Dr. Miller can help.

item.title: Hector C.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I came to see Julee because I needed someone who understood my diagnosis and could help. I had been to many providers who not only didn’t understand, they recommended treatment that would have exacerbated my condition. Treatment with Julee has made a tremendous difference for me. I am a participant in my treatment and we talk about the plan and desired outcome so I know what I can expect. There is nothing hokey about what she does. She understands anatomy and the healing process. She understands me. In a world where providers talk at you rather than with you, I cannot tell you the difference in the approach and outcome of my treatment. Julee has improved my quality of life by taking me from living with chronic pain to being remarkably better and on some days actually pain free. I used to say that if my pain scale was a 6 then I was having a good day. Today my pain level is a 1 or a 2 and seems to be my new norm.

item.title: Tina W.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I am 41 year old, female who has been seeing Dr. Miller for about one year now. After listening to my husband voice his concerns for my thinning hair, I finally sought help. I was in denial about losing my hair for several years and after about 3 months of being treated by Dr. Miller I started to notice little hairs growing and a difference in the thickness of my hair! My hair has never been thick to begin with but in my youth it had been much fuller. I now have that feeling all over again, running my fingers through my hair and enjoying the fullness I have again. I also no longer have the shedding hair lying in the shower drain nor do I have a need to camouflage the thin spots. This treatment has increased my self confidence and I feel great about myself and the way I look as a result. I am so thankful to Acupuncture and Dr. Miller!

item.title: Connie A.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I’d like to say a heartfelt thanks to Julee. Without her, I don’t think I would have my little baby boy. After 3 fertility doctors and one acupuncturist, I finally found Julee in 2009, and a wonderful fertility doctor that was willing to work with me on my terms and not give up. After 3 IVF’s, the fourth one was the charm, and now, in my 40’s, I have my little baby. I honestly think it wouldn’t be possible without Julee. She is so wonderful to work with, and having the acupuncture sessions before and after the IVF procedure, enabled me to relax and find my core. Julee truly understands healthy healing, and is willing to work with you on any level. Julee, thank you so much for all your help, patience and understanding.

item.title: John H.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I wholeheartedly endorse Julee Miller and her approach to helping her clients regain and maintain their fitness activities, including tennis. With a combination of massage therapy and acupuncture, she helped me return to the tennis court (4.5 level) when I was hampered by both a shoulder problem and the return of the asthma & bronchitis I had suffered with as a child. Her analytical and methodical approach not only sold me on even trying the treatment, but enabled me to be more in touch with my body as she overcame these combined maladies. As a 59 year-old, I didn’t expect to be the three-sport letterman I was in high school, but because of Julee, I was able to return to tournament tennis. I am so grateful!

item.title: Jackie D.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: My back, knees and legs have been hurting me for years. I thought it was arthritis and nothing could be done, and being a crossing guard was especially painful. My son had been to Dr Julee Miller and made me an appointment. After my first visit with “The lady with the magic needles” as I call her I felt much better. Now I can continue working at my favorite job pain free. Of course I see her regularly to stay pain free.

item.title: Joe C.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have allergic rhinitis as well as a slew of allergies. Dr J is amazing. I haven’t been able to smell much of anything for year, after my third treatment I could smell the delicacies of a rose!

item.title: Patrick H.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: After injuring my back, my doctor gave me pain meds and referred me to physical therapy. While informed I was given a LARGE dose of pained a I felt little relief. Then the therapist had me doing crunches and lat pull downs….after $500 in co-pays (on top of my ordinary gym membership) and a lot of wasted pills I had chronic pain that really impacted my life. Finally I decided to try acupuncture with Dr. Miller for the first time. I experienced relief after the first treatment and 3 months later I was virtually pain free. 2 years later its as if my injury never occurred. Thanks Doc!

item.title: Lee L.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: After suffering from migraines caused by degenerative disease in my neck I went to Julee on a recommendation from a friend for relief of my reoccurring migraines, 4 plus per week. I was at the point I would try anything and thought this was my last chance before having to have a more aggressive treatment. After a couple visits the severity of the migraines reduced to the point I no longer was taken pain medication regularly. Thanks to Julee, today the frequency and intensity of my migraines only require me to see Julee every couple weeks and taking pain medicine is a rarity.

item.title: Lexi P.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I cannot say enough positive things about HP Jacksonville and Dr. Julee Miller! Whether you have infertility, anxiety, or sleep issues, etc, she can help! I recommend her highly with no reservations! The practice is so wonderful with super easy scheduling and a calming treatment environment. She truly cares about her patients and will do all she possibly can to help you.

item.title: Jeanne M.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have been a patient of acupuncture and alternative healing methods for over 22 years. Dr. Julee Miller’s acupuncture has been extraordinarily effective for me in the treatment of physical ailments (back and neck pain), cold and sinus infections, stress and emotional health and well being. Her practice is patient centered in every aspect. In addition to acupuncture, Julee combines unique homeopathic and natural treatments to optimize your overall health. She is personable, candid and versatile. She will not ‘oversell’ you on a product or service you don’t need. I strongly recommend Dr. Julee Miller and Health Pointe Jacksonville.

item.title: Alison H.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I want to thank you for really listening to me and taking an interest in my personal medical issues. I have learned that it is truly important to be grateful for all of the goodness that comes my way. You and Lisa are special people. My husband and I deal with the public too and we put emphasis on care and concern in regards to their financial situations. This special attention to detail is what separates all of us. You both do that. For that I want to thank you. You make me feel important. I hope your goodness propels you to great things.

item.title: Mary V.
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee is an amazing acupuncturist! I started seeing her in regards to the depression and anxiety I was suffering from. I honestly thought I was going to have to start medication it was getting so bad. I eventually discovered that people did acupuncture to help with it, so I figured I’d try it out. It has truly saved my well being. Dr. Julee really listens and does whatever she can to help. Acupuncture is a beautiful thing and I recommend anyone interested to go to Dr. Julee!

item.title: Robert P
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Julee and her staff have been treating my wife and I for the past two years. We are very selective when it comes to our healthcare, and although skeptical at first, choosing an acupuncturist was the absolute best decision we've made for ourselves in a very long time. I have chronic neck and back issues, and my wife has Primary Sjogrens Syndrome; which the acupuncture treatments have been extremely successful at greatly reducing her day to day pain. Both of us are extremely happy with the progress we've made with managing and relieving our chronic issues with the help of Julee Miller and Health Pointe Acupuncture.

item.title: Ben S
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: After struggling with carpal tunnel syndrome for over 6 years, and trying every treatment that I could, I was ready to schedule a surgery for any relief that it may provide. Thankfully before I went through with the surgery I was recommended to try acupuncture at Health Pointe Jacksonville. Dr. Julee helped me get relief that I stopped believing was even possible. I no longer wear wrist braces all night, and now brushing my teeth each morning isn't the most painful part of my day. I can't recommend them enough. It changed my life.

item.title: Jean M
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I suffer from debilitating migraine headaches. When I first saw Dr. Julee I can say that I literally woke up with a headache five out of seven days a week. After seeing Dr. Julee twice I stopped waking up with a headache!!! Now it is unusual that I wake up with a headache, whereas before it was the norm. Sounds unbelievable, doesn't it? Well, it's true. It is hard to believe that something so relaxing can also have so many benefits! I would recommend Dr. Julee to everyone I know. Do yourself a favor...make an appointment today!

item.title: Mackenzie S
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: This was my first experience with acupuncture. I am hooked! I was having an especially trying day, and feeling overwhelmed by just about everything. I was able to relax, have my pain managed, get health advice, and leave wanting more! Thank you Dr. Julee! I will be back and can't wait to try the Thai Yoga!!!

item.title: Libby K
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Wonderful and professional staff ! I felt very "at home" from the first visit. The treatments are done with patients and complement my personal needs. I felt so relaxed and refreshed after every visit.

item.title: Tracy P
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have been amazed by Julee and her staff for the past 3 years when I have been in and out of town for fertility treatments. She has always found a way to fit me in based on my other doctors appointments. She is super knowledgeable and always answers any questions or concerns I had. I would highly recommend checking her out! She has something for everyone!

item.title: Stacy H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have metastatic breast cancer and have been in treatment on a clinical trial for over a year. My side effects are vomiting daily and extreme fatigue. I have tried many different things to try and combat these side effects and make my quality of life improved but nothing has worked. Well yesterday, I tried acupuncture for the first time. I went to Health Pointe Jacksonville. I am amazed, after 1 session I have had not only No vomiting or nausea since the treatment but I actually have some energy today. Not sure what the future holds with me and this treatment but I am certainly committed to stay the course on this. She recommended 3x a week initially and then we will reassess. I am so impressed and grateful for meeting Julee Miller and her talent at acupuncture. I am optimistic for the first time that maybe I can stay on the medical treatment that is working and enjoy a quality of life to spent with my family and friends.

item.title: Freida H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I love Dr. Julee, and today was only my second visit! She is extremely knowledgeable, and easy to communicate with! My body takes a beating at work almost every day, and now I feel so calm and not knotted up and in pain. Thank you, Dr. Julee, I am impressed, and telling everyone I know about you!

item.title: Brittney R
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I've been doing acupuncture with Dr. Julee Miller the past 3 months for chronic back pain and it has helped me in so many ways. My pain is minimal, i'm re-gaining feeling in my left side (after being numb for 11 years since my major back surgery in 2004) i'm sleeping much better and overall am feeling great! The thai yoga there is also awesome!!!

item.title: Gale B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I've only been there about 4 times and i was super tense when i got there, my migraine headaches was taking over my life, i was having them every other day, since i been there i haven't had one to come, and my menopause symptoms are non - existence. This lady is awesome, the acupuncture is working and i love it, its keeping off the pain meds too.

item.title: Karen H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr Julee has been a dream to work with. She is truly engaged in your well being from the first appointment on. Katy at the desk is simply terrific. And Melanie's Thai foot message delivers. Thank you!

item.title: Natalie G
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Saw Julee on a regular basis for 3 years. She took care of my knee pains within two treatments and the rest was all maintenance and balance. She is awesome and l would definitely recommend her.

item.title: Cathy C
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have been a patient of Julee's for three years. Julee has helped me enormously in various ways: pre and post surgeries, arthritis, and recurrent problems which she keeps in check! I leave there invigorated and happy. Thank you for all you have done.

item.title: Annmarie K
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr julee miller,in my opinion is the best acupuncturist around! No matter what your ailment is I believe she will help you! She is very professional, kind, caring, knowledgeable, and super flexible with scheduling. She is always very calming,soothing and positive. No doubt you will leave your appointment feeling amazing!

item.title: Dave W
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have Osteoarthritis in my bilateral hips and lower back pain. I also have depression and anxiety real bad. My experience with Dr. Julie Miller has been awesome. With my hip injury the only thing that will fix me is surgery. With Dr. Julee, she has prolonged my surgery due to her procedures. The procedures did not fix my hip problem, but it sure did help. My depression and anxiety has cleared, my lower back pain is gone. She is very knowledgeable and will definitely cater to your every need. After Every visit I felt as if I didn't have any issues leaving out. I definitely recommend Dr. Julee, she will always be my first choice to whom I will refer.

item.title: Patrick M
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I injured my back recently and was experiencing significant pain. After the first treatment I experienced substantial relief. Went from an 8 on pain to a 3. The same decrease in pain from the second treatment and by the 3rd and final treatment there was no pain. All the staff at Health Point are friendly and professional. So glad I went to them.

item.title: Audreina Z
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee is simply amazing! Highly recommend her services!!! :)

item.title: Jill
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Went there for TMJ, some sinus and ear issues and received an amazing head, facial and neck massage. Melanie took her time and addressed every spot. I also had rotator cuff surgery in February, so my neck and shoulder were pretty tight. She massaged my neck down to my shoulder blade and I felt like a new person when I left. She also stretched and massaged my shoulder area for motion. When I left there I was so relaxed and tension free. I will definitely be going back! Thank you Melanie!!

item.title: Bruce T
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr Julee, through acupuncture treatments, has been able to vastly improve the headaches that I have experienced for some time now. Neurologists had prescribed many different medications, but none of those medicines touched the severity of the headaches. She also is very concerned about your overall health. You don't get that type of care very often these days. Everybody there is also very professional and friendly. I would highly recommend Health Pointe Jacksonville.

item.title: Pari N
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr Julee, is very caring and knowledgeable. She knows what is best for you. she talks to you like a friend and advices you. I would vote the best place for acupuncture.

item.title: Lisa L
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: My husband and I were undergoing IVF and were willing to try anything and everything. Julee was exactly what I needed to supplement my treatments. She specializes in infertility and very clinical in her approach. She wanted to know my lining and follicle sizes to help guide her treatment. I felt I was in good hands and I'm so grateful to have found her to also help destress. When she put points for my sinuses, I'd fall asleep in a drop of a dime. I am now going to her to help sustain the preganacy! <3 I highly recommended her and her staff!

item.title: Russell H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have been seeing Dr Julee Miller, for five weeks now, for dry eye, light sensitivity, lower legs/ feet and male E D. What I can say is ,all of my medical issues are getting much better with Acupuncture treatments two times too, three times a week. I’m so happy with the results, I wanted to write a quick blog of more than appreciation. To the great work Dr. Julee is doing. Ty

item.title: Morris H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I am a 34 year black male, who received a diagnosis of Bell's Palsy. I went to the emergency room, because I thought I was having stroke and was prescribed prednisone (Steroid). I was told that there was really nothing else they could do for me. After research on the web, I was led to the most amazing doctor on this planet. Dr. Julee @ Health Point Jacksonville is phenomenal! The staff is amazing. Dr. Julee Miller was knowledgeable with my condition and started treating me acupuncture and non-traditional herbal medicine. I immediately started seeing results after the first treatment, and my facial features were fully restored within a two week time frame. I want to send a special thanks you for all that you have done to help me.

item.title: Michelle M
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Julee Miller has provided better resolution to health concerns than western medicine alternatives I have used. She has successfully relieved my chronic arm & shoulder tendonitis, lower back pain, neck pain flaring from tension and pressure from bulging disc, allergies & sinusitis and is now helping me with insomnia that has been ongoing for years. Acupuncture and other treatments used at Health Pointe provide me with immediate and extended relief without oral meds that have undesired side effects. Julee provides advice on ways to avoid recurrence of the problem (preventative treatment) while treating the condition at hand. She is also able to determine how your health insurance may cover the treatments offered at Health Pointe. I wish I had looked into acupuncture and found Health Pointe a long time ago. I leave each treatment amazed at how effective it is and how my overall health is improving. I whole-heartedly recommend Health Pointe!

item.title: Salonicka B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I am a 43 years old and have been living with chronic pain for about 20 years. Some years back I was diagnosed with fibromyalgia and recently osteoarthritis. I have been on several different medications throughout the years without significant relief of my pain. After researching for more natural remedies vs medication, I decided to try acupuncture. This was the BEST decision I ever made and choosing Dr. Julie made that decision even better. Her office and staff are very inviting, soothing and relaxing. After my first treatment, I could tell a difference in my pain. I’ve had about 5 treatments and have been taking an herbal supplement she prescribed and my pain has improved so much! I no longer have wear my hand brace all the time. My muscles no longer ache at night and I’m able to sleep all night.

item.title: Liz V
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I'm so glad I found this place. I feel so welcome here. Dr. Julee Miller is professional, listens to my concerns and addresses them every session. All the the message/physical therapists there are wonderful and work as a team to treat you holistically. It is peaceful, relaxing and I feel they truly care about helping. And the ladies in the reception are so sweet and always ask how I'm doing and offering water. I really can't say enough nice things.

item.title: John W
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: After injuring my shoulder, I visited HP Jax. Dr. Miller and her team did acupuncture, injections, cupping and deep tissue massage. After 6 weeks of therapy, I am golfing pain free again. I highly recommend Health Pointe Jax.

item.title: Bev A
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I suffered from lower back pain for years. Chiropractors could not "fix" me. They made it worse. Then I found Dr. Julee. She has completely cured my lower back pain after just a few short visits. I also threw my knee out at the gym doing squats and couldn't stand the pain. I couldn't move, sit, sleep, etc. it was awful. Dr. Julee and Dr. Jan fixed that pain too! I also see Melanie for massage therapy. She's absolutely wonderful too. I am so grateful for everyone there. The entire staff is welcoming, happy and awesome!

item.title: Kerri B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: After two years of unexplained secondary infertility and three miscarriages, my doctors were at a loss and suggested we try in-vitro. With Dr. Julee’s help we were able to conceive naturally after only 3 months of treatment. I went on to have a smooth pregnancy and we are so thankful for our miracle baby girl! Dr. Julee is amazing. She is gracious and so understanding. She not only treats your body, but your whole mind. She takes time to listen to all your concerns and puts her patients first. I have recommended countless friends and colleagues to Dr. Julee. Also, the office staff is amazing. Making appointments are super easy and can be done online. If you need alternative medicine in your life (which we all do!), you need Dr. Julee!

item.title: Crystal B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I've been incredibly pleased with my experience with Dr. Julee and her team! I started seeing Dr. Julee in early January for infertility after trying to conceive for a year and a half and experiencing a heartbreaking miscarriage at 10 weeks the previous fall. She asked me to give her three months (12 weeks) of treatments. Fortunately, thanks to Dr. Julee and her team, we were able to conceive naturally after 3 months - just as she had promised. I'm delighted to say that I'm currently 18 weeks pregnant and I've had a happy and healthy pregnancy. Dr. Julee has felt like my advocate and partner throughout this entire process, and for that I'm most grateful. I highly recommend her!

item.title: Emma B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: The facility is very clean and the staff is welcoming. Dr. Julee knows her acupuncture and I feel my headaches are improved since I started this regime. I have also enjoyed many massages there. The therapists are knowledgeable and do a wonderful job.

item.title: Samantha N
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I attend Health Pointe Twice a week and so far it is the best experience of my life. I leave each appointment feeling refreshed. Dr. Julee is great. The staff is very attentive and caring. You will not regret coming here.

item.title: Maria T
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I cannot thank Dr. Julee and her professional staff enough for my well being. The treatments I have received have improved my health and my GP is happy with the improvement as well. It takes a woman to recognize and treat women issues. Masseuse Denise is wonderful as well. She puts me back together each time. I love they are all a part of my healthcare team!

item.title: Laura B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I’ve been coming for about 6 weeks for headaches. They improved almost instantly with twice a week treatments the first 4 weeks. Love the staff and professional spa like environment.

item.title: Evelene W
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee Miller is AWESOME! This has been my first experience with acupuncture. I'm trying this form of treatment due to a sciatica issue. The facility is beautiful, the staff is extremely pleasant & helpful & I'm looking forward to her continued care. I would highly recommend this facility! I'm happy to report that my sciatica issue no longer exists! I have recommended this facility to a co-worker & my sister-in-law. I'm hoping they have the same GREAT RESULTS! I can't thank Julee enough for the relief! Acupuncture, cupping, herbs & stem therapy have been incredible! If you're at your wits-end with suffering from back, neck, shoulder or sciatica issues, this is the facility & staff you'll want to visit to manage the pain, if not totally make it disappear!

item.title: Lilliana I
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr Miller has given me my Life back, 5 weeks ago I could barely walk, so much pain, I had to quit my job and didn’t know what else to do, I know she helped me in the past and I knew she was my last hope, here I am today ready to work again 90% better and smiling again. She is wonderful and her team

item.title: Jada L
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I’ve had a great experience with my masseuse Denise. She is professional, pleasant and has great conversation. You are greeted by friendly staff in a relaxing environment. I highly recommend this place for treatment and relaxation.

item.title: Sara H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have been trying to find relief for many health problems for years. I have tried just about every approach available in western medicine. Nothing was helping and I was frustrated. I was initially hesitant to try acupuncture because it seemed like such a simple thing, too simple to actually make a difference. After just four sessions, my sleep and digestion are better. I have better endurance phsyically and my joints are in significantly less pain. Menstruation is less painful. I didn't believe this would actually work, yet it did. The Staff at Health Pointe Jacksonville are lovely. They are friendly and accommodating. I am able to schedule my appointments after work so I don't have to take time off. The facility is clean and closely follows safety protocols for COVID. I highly recommend Health Pointe Jacksonville Acupuncture!

item.title: S. Fon
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee and her entire staff are wonderful! I immediately felt comfortable and welcomed. I first started seeing Dr. Julee after being unable to conceive for a year and half. My diagnosis was “unexplained infertility.” I had previously been going to a different acupuncturist for fertility and I can tell you that they did not even compare to Dr. Julee! She is incredibly knowledgeable and professional. Within just a few sessions, I had some significant changes to my cycle (shorter period, less cramps etc). Regular treatments with Dr. Julee and an IUI did the trick! I am happy to say that I am now pregnant and honestly don’t think I would be here without the help of Dr Julee :).

item.title: Lisa V
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: My husband and I were undergoing IVF and were willing to try anything and everything. Julee was exactly what I needed to supplement my treatments. She specializes in infertility and very clinical in her approach. She wanted to know my lining and follicle sizes to help guide her treatment. I felt I was in good hands and I'm so grateful to have found her to also help destress. When she put points for my sinuses, I'd fall asleep in a drop of a dime. I am now going to her to help sustain the preganacy! <3 I highly recommended her and her staff!

item.title: Heather K
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee is amazing and very patient with our 8 year old son. Acupuncture has made such an improvement in his life. Having tried a multitude of traditional pediatric behavioral health service providers and treatment methods with no improvements in our son’s focus, anxiety, or motivational drive we were at our wit’s end. Following the advice of some of Dr. Julee’s other clients we attended an open house with our son. Immediately his interests were piqued, so we decided to give acupuncture therapy a try. Just within the first few therapy sessions we could see positive changes in behavior during the therapy. His behavior, anxiety, and drive in the classroom and home soon made a positive turn for the better. This was the first treatment that had positive results and we look forward to seeing the full outcome with long-term treatment.

item.title: G San
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I am a 34 year black male, who received a diagnosis of Bell's Palsy. I went to the emergency room, because I thought I was having stroke and was prescribed prednisone (Steroid). I was told that there was really nothing else they could do for me. After research on the web, I was led to the most amazing doctor on this planet. Dr. Julie @ Health Point Jacksonville is phenomenal! The staff is amazing. Dr. Julee Miller was knowledgeable with my condition and started treating me acupuncture and non-traditional herbal medicine. I immediately started seeing results after the first treatment, and my facial features were fully restored within a two week time frame. I want to send a special thanks you for all that you have done to help me.

item.title: Sara A
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Great service very very very welcoming and the service is really fast. I received B12 injection I felt the results right away :-)

item.title: Jeremy L
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee took me in as a patient after arriving home from a six month deployment. I searched the city for the best in this field and I was beyond sold with the background that Dr. Julee has under her belt. Upon arriving back home I began my training for the Triple Jump, after two weeks back on the track my body was in terrible condition and the pain I was experiencing was unbearable. I went through similar treatments in college, and Dr. Julee immediately had a plan for me after describing the pain. One month worth of treatments had me in the best rehab shape I have ever experienced in my life. Currently being enlisted in the military, I owe a major part of my stellar performances competing with the best collegiate athletes to Dr. Julee. I can't repay the health that Dr. Julee has restored to my athletic career, she for sure is the best around.

item.title: Erin G
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Two thumbs up! I signed up for a massage in order to relieve some holiday and work stress. Not only were they able to get me in quickly, my experience was fluid and top-rate. It also was more affordable than one of the big franchises. Can't beat the quality and convenience. I highly recommend them.

item.title: Carol S
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I Absolutely LOVE this place! I have seen Dr. Julie and the massage therapist who are they are so friendly, professional and personable. I Will Be Back!!!

item.title: Barbara M
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: My son is 5 and slow growing. The dr’s wanted to do all the testing and eventually put him on growth hormones. He has a bird sized appetite. I wanted to try all options before that hormones and I knew with my own experience how acupuncture can help so I found this office that takes the littles. He has received acupressure from Dr. Jan. She is AMAZING and he is ravenously hungry when we leave. Wonderful lady and we can’t wait to go back.

item.title: Scott S
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I am writing this review from HPJ with foot full of needles. I have been a patient here for about 2 years and Dr Miller has done more for my twice broken foot than my podiatrist and 2 orthopedic surgeons combined. She is knowledgeable, professional and honest. I would recommend her without hesitation and would trust her to treat my child.

item.title: Pam A
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I have not felt this good in years! The staff is very friendly and inviting. Dr. Julee is very knowledgeable and helpful. I have recommended this office to many of my friends an co-workers and look forward to my healthy progression. They combine different treatment options and methods for you to feel your best.

item.title: Linda P
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Excellent care by Dr. Julee Miller, is what you will experience when you are treated at Health Pointe Jacksonville. Dr. Miller's comprehensive approach to my treatment has me feeling better physically as well as emotionally. Her meticulous healing environment feels more like a spa than a doctor's office. If ever you have considered seeking improved health and wellness with acupuncture, look no further. Dr. Julee is the without a doubt, who you need to turn to.

item.title: DP
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "My sister Deborah has suffered from debilitating migraines since 1980. She has tried all the medications and treatments available, including botox. We finally decided acupuncture couldn't hurt. We found Dr. Julee Miller of Health Pointe Jacksonville on the internet. Reviews were good and all certifications in place, we were willing but still skeptical. Today is the second treatment, and relief is in sight for the 1st time in decades. Thank you Dr. Julee from our entire family for helping Deborah."

item.title: Laura
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I’ve been coming for about 6 weeks for headaches. They improved almost instantly with twice a week treatments the first 4 weeks. Love the staff and professional spa like environment. Update! Been coming over a year. The massages are very therapeutic and the perfect compliment to acupuncture. I can tell when I do not come to acupuncture. There is such a difference!"

item.title: Lourdes
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "My lifeline to a normal life with no pain Just had a massage by Alesha. I felt renewed. Dr Julee and her staff are dedicated to improving the quality of life for their clients. They have certainly improved mine.

item.title: Kaleigh
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "Dr.Miller and her staff are truly phenomenal! The treatments have given me amazing results on a pre-existing injury. Everyone is always so friendly and professional as well

item.title: Octavia
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I have only been a patient of Dr. Julee’s for 4 weeks and my thyroid issues are already being resolved, evidenced in my recent blood work, after seeing her twice a week and sticking to her recipes. I am a pre-natal patient and the level of comfort and care from her and her entire staff has been incredible!! Thank you!!

item.title: Isabella
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "Dr. Miller and the team at Health Point Jax are so incredible! My life and wellness journey have improved significantly since starting weekly acupuncture treatments. Dr. Miller is so knowledgeable and answers my millions of questions with care and concern. I would not be where I am today without the help of the Health Point Jacksonville Team!

item.title: Austin
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "Was not able to hardly walk in and still couldn’t when I left. After about 4-5 hours I was up walking almost as if nothing had been a issue. I also should add I had been immobile for three weeks. All the ladies here are super helpful, kind and accommodating. I’d give ten stars if it was a choice. This was my first time ever doing acupuncture and I am now a believer and customer for life. Thank you all for the help"

item.title: Tara
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I have been receiving acupuncture and massages and so far have been able to control my pain and avoid surgery for a herniated disc. Dr Julee and Denise are a wonderful blessing , I am so grateful for them. The entire office, especially Lisa is so welcoming and attentive. I look forward to my appointments."

item.title: Leola
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I Love it from Day one they are very inviting and caring From Dr Miller to each of her staff I have never tried acupuncture but I’m on week 3 and the results in my hands and feet are amazing. They are very kind each time. Ms Lisa at the front desk thank you .I don’t know everyone name yet but Thanks every one. I recommend this place for health and wellness. Oh and the foot soak…… 5 star service all the way. Thank you Dr Julee and staff ."

item.title: Tasha
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "Dr. Miller is so knowledgeable and has been so helpful on my journey. I have been a patient for just a short while and already have improvements not only in what I came to see her for but also in other areas that I never even anticipated. Traditional medicine was not able to help me and in a short amount of time Dr. Miller has. The staff is so friendly as well. A great practice!!"

item.title: Sanela
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I started going here two years ago, because I had severe pain in my neck and had herniated discs and migraines. This place has been so helpful in managing my pain that I still go nowadays too. The acupuncture was really good in helping me. Dr Julie is an amazing doctor and Lisa at the front desk is amazing too. I love this please of care and would recommend anyone with issues to go."

item.title: Julie
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I have been seeing Dr. Julee for almost a year now. Every time I leave my appointment I feel relaxed and my mindset is positive. Everyone in the office is absolutely wonderful. Going through an infertility journey is stressful and confusing. Having Dr. Julee on our team is so helpful and reassuring. From lifestyle to supplements to weekly acupuncture I am confident that I am doing everything in my power to be successful."

item.title: Diana
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I cannot recommend Dr. Julee and her practice enough. I have been struggling going from doctor to doctor trying to find someone who will actually want to treat the root cause. Dr. Julee listened and immediately started a treatment plan that targeted the whole body as a system.. not just treating the symptoms. Her staff never fails to put a smile on my face and to make me feel so welcomed and like family. Dr. Julee has such a deep depth of knowledge and we are truly blessed to have her expertise here in Jacksonville. Her treatments are very calming and gentle. I strongly recommend Health Point Jacksonville Acupuncture + Wellness Clinic for all of your health needs!

item.title: Kimberly
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "Such a wonderful facility and great staff! The acupuncture was very approachable /relaxing and I am definitely looking forward to the massage. Everything is clean and inviting, plus they have a little fun, I got a Valentine's present even! They made sure my insurance was all good to go and everything was covered. Every aspect from the intake, to the appointment, to the payment was seamless and fantastic. I'm so happy to be continuing my care here!"

item.title: Valerie
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I can’t tell you how much better I feel since going to dr Julie. She helps my immune system, helps depression and anxiety, also sciatic problems. The place is clean the people that work there are sweet as can be and very helpful I can’t say enough good about about Health Point Jacksonville "

item.title: LeighAnn
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "If would give Julee waaaay more stars than 5! Absolutely wonderful! For years I had unexplained pain, and when the diagnosis arrived - surgery was recommended as the only 2 options. Option one was to remove an ovary to see "if the pain would stop" and the other was a full hysterectomy at 35! I went to Julee Miller w/ Health Pointe Jax and had acupuncture sessions as well as took the recommended herbs. A few months later I went for a check-up and there was no sign of the prior condition! The doctor even asked me, "who told you that you had fibroids, not only are there none, but there is no evidence of any having been there!" Julee (Dr. Miller) has also treated me for migraines and muscle tension with absolutely miraculous results! She always understands whatever symptoms or conditions I have described to her and her treatments have always been highly effective! She also has a wonderful ‘bed-side manner’ and is a lovely practitioner."

item.title: Crystal
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "Octavia has been doing my post op recovery manual lymphatic drainage massages. She has been an essential part of my recovery. She is very knowledgeable and does a wonderful job with my massages. Thank you!"

item.title: Sara
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I can't say enough wonderful things about my experience at Health Pointe Jacksonville. The cleanliness of the practice, professionalism of the staff and knowledge of Dr. Miller surpassed my expectations. Dr. Miller was very invested in our fertility struggles and truly cares about her patients. Thank you, Dr. Miller for helping us conceive. I went to Health Pointe Jacksonville for biweekly acupuncture sessions as recommended by her individualized treatment plan. After 7 weeks of treatments, we conceived and are expecting. I highly recommend Health Pointe Jacksonville for anyone interested in receiving acupuncture. They are the best."

item.title: Ryian
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: "I have felt so much love from my first consultation and every time I walk in. Everyone is so personable, and positive. I love Dr. Julee and all her staff!"

item.title: Michael E
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: We have had the best experience with Health Pointe Jacksonville.. The atmosphere is peaceful and the staff is great! They are very calming, courteous, attentive, and always punctual. My wife is undergoing a series of sports acupuncture treatments for a bilateral sports-related injury and is seeing amazing results. She even went in once with a separate issue and they took care of her and tackled that problem to with amazing results. I am so happy that I found them and can’t say enough great things about them, and the service they provide. My only regret is that I haven’t taken the time to get all of their names so I can list them here!

item.title: Nathan H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I've been a patient for the last two years and I am so grateful for the care my wife and I have received here. Everyone is so friendly and compassionate! Thank you to everyone at Health Pointe Jacksonville for delivering consistent, high quality and compassionate care and service!

item.title: Elizabeth H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I can’t say enough amazing things about Health Pointe Jax! Every single staff member is absolutely a pleasure to be around and so easy to talk to. I truly love going here, it’s like my little getaway from home! I started at the clinic almost two years ago with acupuncture to help with infertility treatments my husband and I were going through and we now have two beautiful twins! Dr. Julee is the best! My migraines have also eased up with acupuncture treatments! Denise and Bethany work wonders with their hands during my massages and I leave feeling so relaxed and happy to know my problem points were thoroughly addressed. And every single one of the girls at the front desk, especially Lisa and Damaris, take such wonderful care of you and your needs and make you feel right at home. :) I couldn’t recommend this place more!

item.title: Kristen S
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I can’t say enough good things about Dr. Julie and her staff. If you’re on your fertility journey and feeling defeated and turning to acupuncture this is the place to go! From day one Dr. Julee took interest in all my labs and my goals.. I felt heard! I can’t recommend Health Pointe enough.

item.title: Hunter D
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Bethany, was fantastic she was extremely professional while maintaining a relaxed down to earth atmosphere. The massage overall, was the best I've ever had. I've never felt so loose and rejuvenated from a massage. Ever. What a great facility with excellent staff from the front desk to the back of the house, excellent experience.

item.title: Brian F
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Outstanding experience. Dr. Julie and her entire staff present a very welcoming and professional team. This has to be the best overall experience I've ever had with a medical/medically related business.

item.title: Janice H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Can't say enough about this clinic! I have been coming for the last 2 years for multitude of issues, from post covid issues, headaches, pain, left sided weakness, and now hormonal imbalance. Dr. Julee and her entire staff have become like our family. This is definitely one of Jacksonville's best kept secret!

item.title: Crestina B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Good place to have massage therapy that really hit the knots needed to be knocked off... Very comfy and relaxing place... Staff are very welcoming too...

item.title: Bobbie A
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: For over 40 years I have had chronic back problems, from neck to feet. Name it my back has it. I went to Dr Julee with a left leg - a 9, and my neck and shoulders a 7. Fourteen sessions later my leg is a 5, my neck a 2. I’ve tried everything, surgery (2), braces, stimulator, PT, narcotics, marijuana. . I have had shots with Pain Management that have often been successful but short term, also they are running out of room to inject them and they hurt a lot more. They may be a forever thing? But Dr Julee has had definite success! She is gentle, caring and has an attitude that makes you feel hopeful and confident. No pain! Weird to look and see several needles but feel absolutely NO pain ( even when the leg was 9!) Both she and Lisa her co-worker make the office so comfortable. I highly recommend Dr Julee and her acupuncture program. I look forward to see where my ever painful back will be in 14 more sessions. . Bobbie

item.title: Vivian L
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr Julee is the best! With her base experience in Sports Medicine and combination with acupuncture, she has the expertise to alleviate my symptoms and align my health to overall proper healing.

item.title: Charlyn M
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Awesome staff, very helpful! Massages provide great relief for back pain.

item.title: Liz C
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Miller is a skillful acupuncturist, her program is customized to my current issues. The massage therapist is amazing and Lisa at the front desk is such a gracious lady. Its truly is a welcoming place for my wellness.

item.title: Khrystle M
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Miller and her staff have all treated me with kindness and respect from the first interaction. I feel grateful for finding Health Pointe to get some relief from health issues.

item.title: Emily H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Absolutely love it here, great staff, great experience, Dr. Julee is amazing and super knowledgeable! Look forward to every session!!

item.title: Shilpa P
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: The best decision I made for myself  With a chaotic life and undergoing so many treatments, I was under a lot of stress and was down most times. That's when I heard of acupuncture and wanted to give it a try. I found HPJ and met up with Dr. Julee. She is extremely kind, understanding of your situation and knows exactly what you need. Love her. She is the best. I'm so glad I chose to come here. I can tell you how much better I feel about the stress and about myself in general. I am always greeted by sweetest people especially Damaris. She is so sweet y'all. Every session is the so relaxing. I highly highly recommend Health Pointe Jax because they made a difference in my life :)

item.title: Dana C
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Dr. Julee and the whole team at HPJ are incredible! Can not recommend them enough.

item.title: Sarah W
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Health Pointe is the best! Everyone is so friendly and welcoming. Dr. Julee goes above and beyond to listen to your needs and you can tell she truly cares. I leave every visit feeling super renewed and completely relaxed. 10/10 recommend!

item.title: Hannah F
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Don’t think twice before you book an appointment with Dr.Julee, especially if you have unexplained fertility issues. A year ago I started seeing Dr.Julee. I had recurrent miscarriages, a previous uterine fibroid, endometriosis, hyperthyroidism, hormone imbalances, and chronic inflammation due to autoimmunity. I began her fertility treatment program in November 2022. After 3 months I saw some progress and she recommended that I continue for another round due to my autoimmune condition. Within a month of starting the 2nd round of treatment I started seeing improvements in my hormones, less pain in my body and improved digestion. By 6 months I had very little pain and inflammation, my cycles normalized and she felt I could start trying to conceive. In April, after only 6 months of treatment we conceived on the first cycle that we tried. . I am now 19 weeks pregnant! I continued to do a 3rd round of treatment so that I could maintain the pregnancy and give my body the support it needed. I have no doubt that Dr.Julee’s treatments assisted in my success of becoming (and staying) pregnant. I was told by a fertility doctor that I would require IVF. However, I deeply believe in our body’s innate intelligence to move in the direction of healing and homeostasis, especially with the assistance of traditional medicine. I stayed consistent with her program, took all of the recommended herbs, did castor oil packs to help my liver, continued my yoga practice, and sought ways to alleviate any stress. I didn’t stop believing that it was possible for me to conceive naturally! Dr.Julee and her team are professional, no nonsense, and it is an all woman run organization. You can tell that she puts a lot of care into her patient’s welfare and her staff. I am forever grateful to Dr.Julee and her team. It is a blessing that Jacksonville has a practitioner that is so knowledgeable and affective at what she does.

item.title: Rebecca C
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: From the moment I walked in for the first time, I felt so welcomed and at ease (I was a little nervous for my first MLD massage) but Alesha made the whole experience great and I looked forward to the next appt and now every appt - she is SO knowledgeable about the field and offers realistic expectations for my recovery post-op and great tips in between appointments. I am so happy I came here. Not to mention the absolute BEST customer service at reception with Shira. I cannot express how sweet she is!! She has the perfect energy for meeting people and accommodating all the patients. She is an absolute gem!

item.title: Kristin K
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: One of the most kind, welcoming atmosphere I’ve been too! As soon as you walk in, you feel at peace! I feel Safe and supported by each professional that works there!

item.title: Maria E
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I was suffering from chronic back pain, after two visits I saw an enormous improvement. I was able to clean my yards, play with baby and dog. I highly recommend the acupuncture and injections, my back and neck pain have decreased by 90%. Extremely satisfied patient

item.title: Kelly B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I love this place! I come here every week for massage therapy and acupuncture as needed. Highly recommend body work done here for anyone that has never tried it or looking for somewhere to maintain.

item.title: Carolina H
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: With everyday life and 2 kids I realized I needed to do something for me. I was having terrible head aches along with back and neck pain. I was told how amazing Dr. Julee was and well they were right! I’ve been a patient now for a few months and I can feel an incredible difference. More energy, less pain and I just feel like myself again. Thank you Dr Julee and her incredible staff, you all are truly amazing.

item.title: Ashante D
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I’ve really had an amazing experience with health point the team called me by name every time i received acupuncture and while it doesn’t feel like a big deal people looking at you as an individual instead of a check or a number speaks volumes to the care i received. I would recommend my own family to dr Julee

item.title: Star S
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I’ve really had an amazing experience with health point the team called me by name every time i received acupuncture and while it doesn’t feel like a big deal people looking at you as an individual instead of a check or a number speaks volumes to the care i received. I would recommend my own family to dr Julee

item.title: Leola B
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: I Love it from Day one they are very inviting and caring From Dr Miller to each of her staff I have never tried acupuncture but I’m on week 3 and the results in my hands and feet are amazing. They are very kind each time .Ms Lisa at the front desk thank you .I don’t know everyone name yet but Thanks every one.I recommend this place for health and wellness. Oh and the foot soak…… 5 star service all the way.Thank you Dr Julie and staff .

item.title: Allison Barrett
item.dc:creator: hpjax
item.content:encoded: Two and a half years ago, I completely lost my taste and smell due to Long Covid. After trying everything to regain my senses with no success. Dr. Miller was able to help me completely regain my taste and smell. You don’t realize how much you take your senses for granted until you lose them. I cried the first time I could taste my food and smelled the Maxwell House coffee as I drove downtown. To be able to taste and smell again has brought me immense joy. And I’m extraordinarily grateful for Dr. Miller’s expertise.
